# Vendored xterm.js browser assets

These files are copied without modification from the following MIT-licensed
npm packages:

- `@xterm/xterm` 5.5.0 (`xterm.js`, `xterm.css`)
- `@xterm/addon-fit` 0.10.0 (`addon-fit.js`)
- `@xterm/addon-unicode11` 0.8.0 (`addon-unicode11.js`)
- `@xterm/addon-web-links` 0.11.0 (`addon-web-links.js`)

The package versions are the mutually compatible set published with xterm.js
5.5.0. Each package's license is preserved beside its browser asset.
